# Summit House Napa
> Luxury monthly vacation rental on Mount Veeder, Napa Valley, California.

## About
Summit House Napa is a restored 1969 A-frame cabin available for monthly rentals on Mount Veeder in Napa Valley. 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, sleeps 11. 2 private acres with ancient redwoods, hot tub, infrared sauna, outdoor shower, and meditation trail. Starlink satellite internet for reliable remote work. 15 minutes from downtown Napa.

## Pricing
- Peak Season (April–November): $12,000–$16,000/month
- Off-Peak (December–March): $8,000–$11,000/month
- 30-day minimum stay
- Utilities, WiFi, and all amenities included

## Ideal For
- Remote workers and digital nomads seeking a month-long wine country retreat
- Families wanting an extended Napa Valley vacation
- Couples celebrating milestones (anniversaries, honeymoons, sabbaticals)
- Corporate teams on creative offsites or leadership retreats
- Seasonal renters looking for a "Napa summer lease" — the wine country equivalent of a Tahoe ski lease

## Property Highlights
- Restored 1969 A-frame architecture with floor-to-ceiling windows
- Mount Veeder location at elevation with valley and forest views
- Hot tub, infrared sauna, outdoor shower
- Meditation trail through ancient redwoods
- Starlink satellite internet (reliable for video calls and remote work)
- Full kitchen, washer/dryer, EV charger
- 15 minutes from downtown Napa, 10 minutes from Oakville Grocery
- Surrounded by world-class wineries (Hess Collection, Mount Veeder Winery, Mayacamas)

## Guest Reviews
Rated 4.88 out of 5 from 16 verified Airbnb reviews.

## Booking
Website: https://www.summithousenapa.com
Availability: https://www.summithousenapa.com/availability
Email: stay@summithousenapa.com

## Key Policies
- Minimum stay: 30 days
- Check-in: 4:00 PM / Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Pets: Inquire when booking
- Road access: Paved but winding mountain road; AWD recommended November-March
- Cell service: Limited on Mount Veeder; Starlink WiFi covers all connectivity needs

## Location
Mount Veeder, Napa Valley, California
15 minutes from downtown Napa
1 hour from San Francisco
20 minutes from Sonoma
